description: Implement a backlog task, review it, and verify with checks until both pass.

task.description: the backlog item or feature slice to implement

context.description: extra notes, plan, ticket context, or constraints

builder.instructions: You implement a small, well-scoped code slice. Keep changes minimal and aligned with the task.

reviewer.instructions: You review the diff for correctness, scope, and missing verification. Return structured JSON only. You do not edit files.
